name: Mixer Speaker → Apply Ducking
description: This action ducks (reduces the volume of) the media stream.

config_entries.label: Decibel Reduction
config_entries.description: The reduction of the media stream in decibels. Must be between 0 and 50.

config_entries.label: Duration
config_entries.description: The length of time to transition between the current reduction level and the new reduction level. Defaults to `0s`.
